nodes.name: Webhook: /prospect
nodes.notes: POST an ICP search or a list of company domains; the prospecting service finds decision-makers, enriches phones, and writes them into the Lead sheet.

parameters.content:
## Flow F — Prospecting → CRM

Webhook POST /prospect → prospecting service (port 8300).

**ICP search** body:
```
{
  "industries": ["Manufacturing"],
  "revenues": ["10M-50M"],
  "countries": ["Pakistan"],
  "seniorities": ["cxo","director"],
  "write": true
}
```

**Known companies** body:
```
{ "domains": ["acme.com","globex.com"], "write": true }
```

Service finds CEO/CTO/Director, enriches phones, writes 'New Lead' rows → Flow A dials them.

Env: LUSHA_API_KEY (Premium/Scale), PROSPECT_MAX_WRITE.
